commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional diarized transcript segment fields and OpenAI-compatible audio multipart options for media-understanding audio providers.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new provider-output capability rather than reporting broken current-main behavior. The available proof is source and unit-test oriented, not a reproduction of an existing bug.
